recommendations.title: Five Dolls for an August Moon
recommendations.overview: A wealthy playboy gathers a group of bourgeois friends at his isolated beach house for a weekend of relaxation. When bodies start pilling up, they realize they’re trapped with a killer in their midst, sending them in a frenzy to figure out who amongs

recommendations.title: The Girl Who Knew Too Much
recommendations.overview: A tourist witnesses a murder and finds herself caught up in a series of bloody killings.

recommendations.title: Shock
recommendations.overview: A couple is terrorized in their new house haunted by the vengeful ghost of the woman's former husband who possesses her young son.

recommendations.title: Hatchet for the Honeymoon
recommendations.overview: A madman haunted by the ghost of his ex-wife carves a corpse-laden trail.

recommendations.title: Kill, Baby... Kill!
recommendations.overview: A 20th century European village is haunted by the ghost of a murderous little girl.

recommendations.title: Rabid Dogs
recommendations.overview: Following a bungled robbery, three violent criminals take a young woman, a middle-aged man, and a child hostage and force them to drive them outside Rome to help them make a clean getaway.

recommendations.title: Planet of the Vampires
recommendations.overview: After landing on a mysterious planet, a team of astronauts begin to turn on each other, swayed by the uncertain influence of the planet and its strange inhabitants.

recommendations.title: The Whip and the Body
recommendations.overview: Disowned in the past by his father, Kurt Menliff, a cruel and sadistic nobleman, returns to the family castle to reclaim his inheritance.

recommendations.title: Black Sabbath
recommendations.overview: Three tales of supernatural horror include a woman plagued by threatening phone calls, a family targeted by vampiric monsters, and a deceased medium who wreaks havoc upon the living.

recommendations.title: Lisa and the Devil
recommendations.overview: Lisa is a tourist in an ancient city. When she gets lost, she finds an old mansion in which to shelter. Soon she is sucked into a vortex of deception, debauchery and evil presided over by housekeeper Leandre.
